raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja arridsan teem Israëta
Behrneem weens Gawileschanas-
Gads buhtu / tad taptu winxu
Jhpaſchuuns tahs Zilts Jhpa-
ſchuunam peelikts/kurp tahs nahk-
tu / un tas Jhpaſchuuns tahs
Zilts muhfu Tehwu taptu ma-
saks darrihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja Mohsus
teem Israëta Behrneem/ pehz ta
KUNGA Wahrdn / un fazziia:
Ta Jahsepa Behrnu Zilts run-
na pareist.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis irr tas Wahrdg/ ko
tas KUNGS tahm Zelaweada
Meitahn pawehlejis irr/ un faz-
zijs: Lai tahs Wihru apxem/ ka
winnahm patihk; tomehr tahm
buhs no teem Raddeem winxo
Tehwa Zilts / weenam par See-
wahin ktuht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka tas Jhpaſchuuns to
Israëta Behrno ne tohp no Zilts
us Zilti pahrzelts/ jo teem Israë-
ta Behrneem buhs turretées ik-
weenam pee ta Jhpaſchuma tahs
Zilts tawo Tehwu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un iﬀatrai Meitai / kam
Jhpaſchuuns irr / no tahm Isra-
etka Behrnu Ziltini/buhs weenain
no teem Raddeem fawa Tehwa
Zilts par Seetvn ktuht / ka tee
Israëta Behrni to eemantojamu
Jhpaſchunu fawo Tehwu pa-
turr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ne taps tas Jhpaſchuuns
pahrzelts no weenas Zilts uhs oh-
tru / jo tahm Ziltim to Israëta
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ittin ka tas KUNG S
Mohsum bij pawehlejis/ ta dar-
rija tahs Zelaweada Meitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Maëla / Tirza/ un
Agla/ un Milka/un Noa/ Zela-
weada Meitas/ ktua fawa Teh-
wa Brahta Dehleem par See-
wahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Starp teem Raddeem te
Manaffus Behrnu / Jahsep-
Dehta / irr tahs pee Wihreen-
gahjuſchas / ta patikke winno
Jhpaſchuuns pee tahs Zilts fawa
Tehwu Radda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schee irr tee Bausli / un
tahs Teefas / ko tas KUNG-
zaur Mohsu/ teem Israëta Behr-
neē irr pawehlejis Moaba Klajn-
imōs/ pee Jardanas prett Jeriku
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
